Skip navigation links
  • Module
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbandonRecoveredMatchRequest
    Request a reconnecting player sends when they choose "Leave this match" on the reconnect screen instead of resuming a match that survived a server crash.
    ActionResolutionState
    Phase in which each player, in offer-track order, resolves the action of the tile their totem sits on: gain food and/or take cards.
    AddPlayerToLobbyRequest
    Request to join the lobby of an existing match.
    Ansi
    ANSI escape sequences used by the TUI.
    AsyncClientHandler
    Decorates a ClientHandler so AsyncClientHandler.send(ServerMessage) returns immediately — the actual delivery happens on a per-channel single-thread executor.
    Board
    The shared game board: the two rows of cards on offer (upper and lower), the TurnOrderTile, and the offer track of OfferTiles.
    BonusCardSelectionState
    Temporary phase, activated only when a player owns the bonus-draw building at the end of the action phase.
    Card
    Base type for every card in the game (tribe characters, buildings and events).
    CardDTO
    Serializable card DTO.
    CardJsonLoader
    Loads cards (TribeCharacters, Events, Buildings) from JSON resources.
    ChooseTotemRequest
    Request sent by a player to pick a totem color during the pre-game totem selection phase.
    ClientHandler
    Server-side abstraction of a single client channel (send/close + binding state).
    ClientMain
    Client entry point.
    ClientRequest
    Base interface for all requests the client sends to the server.
    ClientRequestVisitor
    Visitor for client-to-server requests.
    ClientSession
    Pairs a ServerConnection with a VirtualServer and adds a snapshot-replay layer: an internal dispatcher captures every server message, caches the latest lobby/game state, then forwards it to the currently attached view handler.
    ConnectionFactory
    Builds the right ServerConnection for the transport chosen by the user, so the rest of the client only works against the interface.
    ConnectionFactory.Transport
     
    ConnectionScreen
    Initial screen: user picks transport (Socket/RMI), host and port.
    CreateMatchRequest
    Request to create a new match.
    DisconnectPlayerRequest
    Explicit disconnection request from the player.
    EndGameMessage
    Broadcast message sent when the match ends.
    EndGameScreen
    End-game screen: winner, this match's final standings, the local player's position in the historical leaderboard (for matches with the same player count), and a button to view the full leaderboard.
    EndGameState
    Terminal phase of the game.
    Era
    The three historical ages a card (and the game as a whole) can belong to.
    ErrorMessage
    Error message sent by the server to the single client that caused the issue.
    EventResolutionState
    Phase that triggers the end-of-round Events.
    Game
    Root of the game model and the entry point for every game action.
    GameObserver
    Observer notified whenever the observed Game's state changes.
    GameScreen
    Main game screen.
    GameStartedMessage
    Broadcast message sent the moment the match starts.
    GameState
    A phase of the game, modelled with the State pattern.
    GameStateDTO
    Serializable snapshot of the game state.
    GameStateMessage
    Broadcast message with the current match state.
    GuiApp
    JavaFX root: owns the Stage and the ClientSession, acts as the ServerHandler (marshalling messages onto the FX thread), and drives screen navigation: Connection → Nickname → Matches → Lobby → Game → EndGame.
    GuiScreen
    Contract for JavaFX screens.
    ImageCache
    Image cache with automatic fallback to colored placeholders.
    LeaderboardEntryDTO
    A row of the historical match leaderboard.
    ListMatchesRequest
    Request for the list of open (not-yet-started) matches.
    LoadedCards
    Immutable container for the cards loaded from the JSON resources, grouped by category: tribe characters, regular events, the two reserved final events, and buildings.
    LobbyPlayerDTO
    Serializable DTO representing a player in the lobby.
    LobbyScreen
    Lobby screen.
    LobbyStateDTO
    Serializable lobby snapshot, broadcast on every lobby change.
    LobbyStateMessage
    Broadcast message with the updated lobby state.
    MatchAbandonedMessage
    Broadcast sent when a suspended (crash-recovered) match is torn down because one of its players chose to leave instead of reconnecting.
    MatchClosedMessage
    Broadcast message sent when the match is closed abnormally.
    MatchController
    Single server-side controller for one match.
    MatchesListMessage
    Server response listing matches that are open and not yet started.
    MatchesScreen
    Match selection screen: list open matches, join one, or create a new one.
    MatchInfoDTO
    Summary of an open match in the server-side registry, sent to the client when it requests the list of available matches.
    MatchJoinedMessage
    Confirmation sent to the client after creating or joining a match.
    MatchManager
    Server-side core of the multi-match network layer.
    MatchRecoveringMessage
    Broadcast while a crash-recovered match is waiting for its players to reconnect.
    MatchSession
    Per-match state: MatchController + VirtualView, isolated from other matches.
    ModelDtoMapper
    Single point where the network layer reads the model.
    NetworkMessage
    Marker interface for all messages exchanged between client and server.
    NicknameScreen
    Nickname picker.
    OfferTile
    A tile on the offer track.
    OfferTileDTO
    Serializable DTO representing an offer tile on the board.
    PickBonusCardRequest
    Player's request to pick a bonus card.
    PickCardsRequest
    Request to pick one or more cards from the board.
    PickSimulation
    Mutable scratch state used during the VALIDATION phase of a pick action.
    PingMessage
    Application-level liveness probe sent by the server to the client.
    PingRequest
    Application-level liveness probe sent by the client to the server.
    PlaceTotemRequest
    Request to place the totem on an offer tile.
    Player
    A participant in the match: their nickname, victory points (PP) and food, the Tribe they build up and the Totem they move around the board.
    PlayerDTO
    Serializable per-player snapshot.
    ReconnectRequest
    Request to rejoin a match that survived a server crash.
    ReconnectScreen
    Shown only when the connection dropped while the player was in a running match — i.e. the previous match was closed by a server crash.
    RecoveryLobbyScreen
    Lobby-style screen shown after reconnecting to a crash-recovered match that is still waiting for its other players.
    RemovePlayerFromLobbyRequest
    Request to remove a player from the lobby (voluntary leave).
    RmiClientHandler
    ClientHandler backed by an RMI callback: every send is a remote receive() call.
    RmiClientInterface
    RMI callback implemented by the client.
    RmiServer
    RMI implementation of RmiServerInterface.
    RmiServer.Handle
    Holds the references needed to tear down an RMI publication: without them the registry and endpoint stay exported for the lifetime of the JVM, blocking the port and preventing in-process restarts.
    RmiServerConnection
    RMI-based ServerConnection.
    RmiServerInterface
    RMI interface the server exposes to clients.
    RoundUpdateState
    End-of-round cleanup phase: discards spent cards, shifts the rows, refills the upper row (advancing the Era if a higher-Era card surfaces), and recomputes the turn order from the turn-order tile.
    ServerConnection
    Commands the client can send to the server, plus the lifecycle hooks (handler registration and close) used by the transport.
    ServerHandler
    Callback the client view implements to receive asynchronous updates.
    ServerMain
    Server entry point.
    ServerMessage
    Base interface for all messages the server sends to the client.
    ServerMessageVisitor
    Visitor for server-to-client messages.
    SetExpectedPlayersRequest
    Request (typically by the host) to set the expected number of players.
    SetUpState
    Initial phase of the game.
    Slot
    A single space on the TurnOrderTile.
    SocketClientHandler
    Both ClientHandler (synchronized send via ObjectOutputStream) and Runnable (read loop for incoming ClientRequests).
    SocketServer
    ServerSocket + daemon accept thread + cached thread pool: one task per client.
    SocketServerConnection
    TCP socket ServerConnection.
    Totem
    A player's totem (pawn).
    TotemOptionDTO
    Serializable DTO for a single totem color in the selection phase.
    TotemPlacementState
    Phase in which each player, in turn, places their totem on an offer tile.
    TotemSelectionMessage
    Broadcast message carrying the current state of the pre-game totem selection phase.
    TotemSelectionScreen
    Pre-game totem selection scene.
    TotemSelectionStateDTO
    Serializable snapshot of the pre-game totem selection phase, broadcast when the lobby fills up and after every pick.
    Tribe
    A player's tribe: the TribeCharacters and Buildings they have acquired.
    TuiRunner
    TUI entry point.
    TuiView
    Text view.
    TurnOrderTile
    The turn-order tile: the ordered row of Slots that totems return to after acting during a round.
    TurnSlotDTO
    Serializable DTO representing a slot on the turn-order track.
    VirtualServer
    Local proxy of the server on the client side (the "Virtual Server" of the distributed-MVC schema).
    VirtualView
    Server-side virtual View.
    WinnerDTO
    Serializable DTO with the winning player's data.

    Copyright © 2026. All rights reserved.
